Class Database

java.lang.Object
database.Database
public class Database extends Object
Manages the application's H2 database connection and queries. This class supports the assignment user stories for accounts, roles, posts, replies, and login.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Database()
    Creates the shared database helper object.

  • Constructor Details

    • Database

      public Database()
      Creates the shared database helper object.

  • Method Details

    • connectToDatabase

      public void connectToDatabase() throws SQLException
      Opens the database connection and creates the required tables.
      Throws:
      SQLException - when the database cannot be opened

    • savePost

      public void savePost(Post p) throws SQLException

      Method: savePost(Post p)

      Description: Saves a Post object into the H2 database for persistence.

      Parameters:
      p - the Post object to save
      Throws:
      SQLException - when there is an issue creating the SQL command or executing it

    • saveReply

      public void saveReply(Reply r) throws SQLException

      Method: saveReply(Reply r)

      Description: Saves a reply object into the H2 database

      Parameters:
      r - the Reply object to save
      Throws:
      SQLException - when there is an issue creating the SQL command or executing it

    • loadAllPosts

      public List<Post> loadAllPosts() throws SQLException
      Loads all posts from the database.
      Returns:
      all saved posts
      Throws:
      SQLException - when the query fails

    • loadAllReplies

      public List<Reply> loadAllReplies() throws SQLException
      Loads all replies from the database.
      Returns:
      all saved replies
      Throws:
      SQLException - when the query fails

    • deletePost

      public void deletePost(int id) throws SQLException

      Method: deletePost(int id)

      Description: Deletes a post by its ID and also removes all replies associated with that post.

      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the post to delete
      Throws:
      SQLException - when there is an issue executing the SQL command

    • updatePost

      public void updatePost(int id, String newBody) throws SQLException

      Method: updatePost(int id, String newBody)

      Description: Updates the body of a specified post.

      Parameters:
      id - the post ID
      newBody - the new body text
      Throws:
      SQLException - when there is an issue executing the SQL command

    • deleteReply

      public void deleteReply(int id) throws SQLException

      Method: deleteReply(int id)

      Deletes a reply by its ID from the database.

      Parameters:
      id - the reply ID
      Throws:
      SQLException - when there is an issue executing the SQL command

    • updateReply

      public void updateReply(int id, String newBody) throws SQLException

      Method: updateReply(int id, String newBody)

      Description: Updates the body of a specified reply.

      Parameters:
      id - the reply ID
      newBody - the new body text
      Throws:
      SQLException - when there is an issue executing the SQL command

    • isDatabaseEmpty

      public boolean isDatabaseEmpty()
      Checks whether the user table is empty.
      Returns:
      true when no user records exist

    • getNumberOfAdmins

      public int getNumberOfAdmins()
      Counts how many admin users exist.
      Returns:
      the number of admin users

    • getNumberOfUsers

      public int getNumberOfUsers()
      Counts how many users exist.
      Returns:
      the number of users

      public void register(User user) throws SQLException
      Saves a new user record.
      Parameters:
      user - the user to register
      Throws:
      SQLException - when the insert fails

    • getUserList

      public List<String> getUserList()
      Returns usernames for the user selection lists.
      Returns:
      the usernames used by the GUI

      public List<User> getAllUsersForDisplay()
      Returns all users for display.
      Returns:
      the users prepared for the GUI

    • loginAdmin

      public boolean loginAdmin(User user)
      Checks whether the given user can log in as an admin.
      Parameters:
      user - the user being checked
      Returns:
      true when the login is valid

      public boolean loginRole1(User user)
      Checks whether the given user can log in with role 1.
      Parameters:
      user - the user being checked
      Returns:
      true when the login is valid

      Checks whether the given user can log in with role 2.
      Parameters:
      user - the user being checked
      Returns:
      true when the login is valid

      public boolean doesUserExist(String userName)
      Checks whether a username already exists.
      Parameters:
      userName - the username to search for
      Returns:
      true when the username exists

    • getNumberOfRoles

      public int getNumberOfRoles(User user)
      Counts how many roles a user has.
      Parameters:
      user - the user being checked
      Returns:
      the number of roles for that user

      public String generateInvitationCode(String emailAddress, String role)
      Creates and saves an invitation code.
      Parameters:
      emailAddress - the invited email address
      role - the invited role
      Returns:
      the generated invitation code

      public int getNumberOfInvitations()
      Counts how many invitation codes exist.
      Returns:
      the number of saved invitation codes

      public boolean emailaddressHasBeenUsed(String emailAddress)
      Checks whether an email address has already been used.
      Parameters:
      emailAddress - the email address to search for
      Returns:
      true when the email address is already used

      public String getRoleGivenAnInvitationCode(String code)
      Finds the role stored for an invitation code.
      Parameters:
      code - the invitation code
      Returns:
      the role for that code

      public String getEmailAddressUsingCode(String code)
      Finds the email address stored for an invitation code.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the email address for that code

      public void removeInvitationAfterUse(String code)
      Removes an invitation code after it is used.
      Parameters:
      code - the invitation code to remove

      Returns a user's first name.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the saved first name

      firstName - the new first name

      Loads a user's account details into the cached current-user fields.

      Returns:
      true when the user was found

      public void resetUserPassword(String username, String tempPass)
      Resets a user's password to a temporary value.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to update
      tempPass - the temporary password

    • updateUserRole

      public boolean updateUserRole(String username, String role, String value)
      Updates one role value for a user.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to update
      role - the role name to update
      value - the new role value
      Returns:
      true when the role was updated

      Returns:
